profile.name: Alex Candidate
profile.headline: Software Engineer | Distributed Systems | Data Platforms | AI Applications
profile.summary: Software engineer focused on **distributed systems**, **data platforms**, and **AI applications**, with experience shipping production APIs, analytics workflows, and cross-platform tooling

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Built **tenant-scoped APIs** for analytics workflows, serving 250K+ records with request-level authorization and cached reads
Reduced report generation latency from 11s to 3s by batching SQL queries and caching high-frequency dimensions in **Redis**
Instrumented CI health checks, catching schema regressions before deployment across 4 environments

projects.title: AI Resume Validation Toolkit
bullets: Developed **ATS validation scripts** for bullet width, page coverage, PDF text extraction, and structure audits across platforms
Automated HTML-to-PDF rendering with Chrome/Chromium and Poppler for one-command layout QA

details: Coursework: Data Structures, Databases, Operating Systems, Distributed Systems

achievements: Ranked in the top 2% among 8,000+ participants in a national algorithmic programming contest
Selected for a competitive software engineering internship cohort from 1,200+ applicants
leadership: Led a 6-member engineering team to ship a campus placement tool used by 400+ students
publications: Candidate, A. and Collaborator, B. Efficient Resume Layout Validation. Workshop on Practical Developer Tools, 2026
